key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh usage data in seconds

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How to display premium interactions in the panel: 'text' for credit text, 'bar' for a progress bar, or 'both' for both

key.name: icon-style
key.description: Icon style: 'color' for the original colored icon, 'monochrome' for a desaturated monochrome icon

key.name: show-icon
key.description: Whether to show the Copilot icon in the top bar

key.name: show-percentage
key.description: Show used percentage next to the used/total label when finite quota data is available.

key.name: show-token-quantities
key.description: Show used/total token quantities in the panel label when finite quota data is available.

key.name: proxy-url
key.description: Deprecated compatibility key retained to prevent runtime errors during live extension reloads.

key.name: api-token
key.description: Legacy plaintext token key. Existing values are migrated to the login keyring and then cleared.
